servinfo.title: Passenger Air Bag (Inflator) Module Inspection

ptxt.intxrefpoff: Passenger Air Bag (Inflator) Module Removal and Installation

attention1.ptxt: Failure to take proper precautions when inspecting the passenger air bag (inflator) module can result in personal injury due to accidental deployment of the air bag.
Never attempt to measure the resistance of the air bag (inflator) module.

servinfo.ptxt: Check air bag (inflator) module and if any of the following condition is found, replace air bag (inflator) module with new one.

item.ptxt: Air bag (inflator) module being deformed or damaged.
Bend or deformity of air bag (inflator) module bracket.
